message:
refactor: address code review issues for container restart

Issues fixed:
1. MUST FIX - Added documentation comment before restart logic explaining
   configuration drift limitation (lines 475-483). Documents that restart
   preserves state but NOT creation-time configuration like ports, volumes,
   env vars, and network settings.

2. SHOULD FIX - Extracted execIntoContainer() helper function (lines 185-205)
   to eliminate duplicated exec logic between restart and reconnect paths.

3. SHOULD FIX - Extracted executePostStart() helper function (lines 149-183)
   to eliminate duplicated postStart execution logic between restart and
   reconnect paths.

4. SHOULD FIX - Unified working directory calculation across all three paths
   (reconnect, restart, and container creation). All now use:
   workingDir = mountPath (if devConfig.WorkspaceFolder == "")
   workingDir = devConfig.WorkspaceFolder (if set)

   This fixes a bug where reconnect was using workDir (current directory)
   instead of respecting workspaceFolder from devcontainer.json.

Test results: All 56 tests passing (pkg/runner/...)

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
